LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED AS TO AZ LUXE AUTOMOTIVE LLC AS UNOPPOSED AND OFF CALENDAR AS TO MR. EDWARD CLARKE BECAUSE OF THE BANKRUPTCY STAY. ORDER SIGNED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (302/HK)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT AZ LUXE AUTOMOTIVE LLC, AN ARIZONA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $73,082.94 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,036.61 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $78,944.55, DETAILS AT LENGHT SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted as to AZ Luxe Automotive LLC as unopposed and off calendar as to Mr. Edward Clarke because of the bankruptcy stay. Order signed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
